title: Fan Window
body:
Have a different Title Screen !

![New Title Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21da05f3cc9dfed46219f03b8cc0dde52e5f8ef6_0.webp)

本模组提供全新的、经过定制的客户端屏幕来定制游戏体验，并且提供如退出时确认、断线后重连之类的辅助功能。所有功能可以在模组配置中自定义。

本模组支持 Modmenu，可以在新的标题屏幕中显示其入口按钮。如果你同时使用 Replay Mod，本模组也支持显示它的入口按钮。

需要 Cloth Config API 作为前置。

This mod provides a new, customized client screen to enhance the gaming experience, along with quality-of-life features such as exit confirmation and automatic reconnection after disconnection. All features can be customized in the mod's configuration.

This mod supports Modmenu, and its entry button will be displayed on the new title screen. If you are also using Replay Mod, this mod supports displaying its entry button as well.

Cloth Config API​ is required as a dependency.

![New Create World Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fa03a889f548688771cdb15a05a7532ffbbe3b5_0.webp)

![New Background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/768231f058c9ce27cef42f33e39a24c43cf539d2_0.webp)

如果你有兴趣了解更多的话可以来康康这里：<https://fanfan.moe/fanwindow>

![Custom Background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/436fdab06c7487fcf0f4cf41523f7ccc73f26e0b_0.webp)

![Example Title Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CaEMTaH5/images/760b25047945693b5c31bdf644950c040964a8e9.png)

GitHub: [https://github.com/mangofanfan/FanWindow-MinecraftMod](https://github.com/mangofanfan/FanWindow-MinecraftMod)
